violations.text: The (walls ) in the (basement ) area is in poor repair.Observed holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

The floors and walls throughout back storage room and floors near soda line (basement)have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

(Various food product) was observed held at (45-52 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
(Food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in freezer and food storage room ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Knives was observed being stored in between prep units.PIC moved to warewashing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

(The prep units ) located in the (cook line area ) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 47-50DF. PIC made a service call during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The prep table in the front counter area is in poor repair. Inspector observed a warped(gap) in the wood. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (dough drawers ) have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The floors and walls(walk in cooler and food storage room) and floors(basement near soda line) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The (wall ) in the (basement ) area is in poor repair(observed a hole). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (soup) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Marinara, salads and soup packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The freezer door gaskets are in poor repair. Inspector observed loose/torn gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
Prep table located in the prep area was not in good repair. Inspector observed a large gap. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The fan in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
Observed walk-in freezer to have frost buildup and ice accumulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
